title: Ok → Good → Best (Clean Plate UGC)
description: Pinterest-aesthetic Turkish creator. Slow, deliberate three-pose B-roll. Holds each pose while saying one word. Clean plate for CapCut editing.

prompt.concept: Pinterest-aesthetic Turkish creator films a slow, deliberate clean-plate B-roll. ONE pose per word, each pose held still for ~3 seconds. She calmly points to her LEFT and softly says 'ok' (HOLDS the pose), then points UP and says 'good' (HOLDS), then points to her RIGHT and says 'best' (HOLDS). No repeating, no extra hand movement, no waving, no frantic gestures. Clean plate so editor can add icons in CapCut over each held pose.

character.hair: long, loose beach waves, honey blonde with subtle lighter highlights, soft middle part, slightly tousled
character.skin: warm fair-medium, glowy 'clean girl' makeup, dewy finish, soft blush, glossy nude-pink lip, subtle bronzer, fluttery natural lashes
character.eyes: light hazel, soft eye contact with camera
character.expression: calm, confident, soft smile, micro-smirk on the final 'best'
character.vibe: Pinterest 'that girl' / soft luxe / clean aesthetic

wardrobe.top: fitted ribbed tank top with thin spaghetti straps, soft pastel tone (butter yellow OR sage green OR powder blue), flattering neckline with a hint of decolletage, completely plain — absolutely no logos, no text, no prints
wardrobe.jewelry: dainty gold layered necklaces, small gold hoops, one thin gold ring
wardrobe.nails: short almond, milky-white or soft chrome

details: cream linen curtains with soft daylight diffusing through
rattan or cane headboard slightly out of focus behind her
small marble nightstand with a glass vase of dried pampas grass and a stack of hardcover books
warm beige and off-white palette with terracotta and sage accents
framed minimal line-art print on the wall (no readable text)
soft fairy lights or warm lamp glow in the bokeh background

camera.shot: medium close-up, chest up, phone-style front-camera framing
camera.angle: eye level, very slight low angle
camera.lens_feel: iPhone selfie cam, natural depth of field, mild background blur
camera.headroom: leave clean negative space above her head and on both sides of her face for icons to be added later in editing

lighting.key: soft natural window light from camera-left, golden hour warmth
lighting.fill: subtle bounce from a white wall on camera-right
lighting.mood: warm, glowy, airy, no harsh shadows

action_timeline.beat: centered, hands relaxed at chest level, soft smile, calm eye contact
smoothly raises her right index finger and points to HER LEFT (camera-right side of frame), arm bent at elbow, finger extended at head height
HOLDS the left-pointing pose perfectly still, calmly says 'ok', soft smile, no other movement
smoothly transitions: brings hand up and points STRAIGHT UP above her head with index finger
HOLDS the upward-pointing pose perfectly still, calmly says 'good', soft smile, no other movement
smoothly transitions: lowers and crosses hand to point to HER RIGHT (camera-left side of frame), arm bent, finger at head height
HOLDS the right-pointing pose perfectly still, calmly says 'best', subtle smirk, no other movement
drops hand softly, closed-mouth smile, holds eye contact

spoken_lines.voice: soft, warm, slightly girly, casual, unhurried
spoken_lines.pacing: one word per held pose, calm and clear, no repeating

no_text_no_graphics.note: deliver a clean plate — all text, icons, and graphics will be added later in CapCut

audio.background_music: none (clean audio so editor can add music in CapCut)
audio.ambient: very subtle room tone, no traffic or background voices
